rag_rules: Repair validator diagnostics by fixing unresolved references or removing invalid guarantees
Use only visible AADL features or eq helpers declared in the same annex for guarantees
Move implementation-level bindings to the implementation annex when possible
Delete invalid guarantees that reference implementation-level details in type annexes
generic_rules: Preserve existing architecture when repairing validator diagnostics
Use only valid AADL features or AGREE scalar types in contracts
Place guarantees in the appropriate annex scope based on reference visibility
Remove clauses that introduce unresolved references or invalid types
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be placed in appropriate annex scopes
Use AGREE scalar types: int, real, or bool
Implementation-level bindings should be in implementation annexes
anti_patterns: Do not add architecture to fix validator diagnostics
Do not use implementation-level references in component type contracts
Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers in generated AGREE code
